stemHtml: The Third Freedom of the Air is the right or privilege, in respect of scheduled international air services granted by one State to another State…

options.a: to put down and to take on, in the territory of the first State, traffic coming from or destined to a third State.
options.b: to take on, in the territory of the first State, traffic destined for the home State of the carrier.
options.c: to land in its territory and put down traffic, while en-route to the home State of the carrier.
options.d: to put down, in the territory of the first State, traffic coming from the home State of the carrier.
